easy.title: Create a Button with Proper Padding
easy.description: Style a button with comfortable padding — 12px vertical and 24px horizontal — and add rounded corners and a hover effect.
easy.starterCode:
<button class="btn">Click Me</button>

<style>
  /* Add padding, border-radius, and hover */
</style>
easy.solution:
<button class="btn">Click Me</button>

<style>
body { padding: 40px; font-family: Arial; }
.btn {
  background: #4299e1;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  padding: 12px 24px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 16px;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.btn:hover { background: #2b6cb0; }
</style>

hard.title: Fix Padding Overflow and Create Touch Targets
hard.description: The given layout has a fixed-width sidebar where padding causes overflow. Fix it using box-sizing: border-box, and ensure all interactive elements meet the 44x44px touch target recommendation.
hard.starterCode: Dashboard Profile Settings X
hard.solution: Dashboard Profile Settings Close
